headline: 标普500 0.26（mild_positive）；A股行业最强 A-share Brokerage Pool 0.36。

pool_reviews.name: S&P 500 Pool
pool_reviews.label: mild_positive

drivers.description: S&P 500 ETF flow is direct evidence of capital entering or leaving index exposure.
Buybacks can be a structural source of demand for US equities.
S&P 500 ETFs inherit sensitivity to broad dollar liquidity.
Higher volatility usually reduces S&P 500 ETF risk appetite.
The S&P 500 pool inherits broad US equity conditions before adding index-specific evidence.
Higher real rates raise discount-rate pressure on S&P 500 valuations.
Higher 10-year yields can pressure S&P 500 valuation multiples.
Wider credit spreads signal weaker risk appetite and tighter financing conditions.
S&P 500 breadth confirms whether returns are broad or concentrated.
Equal-weight strength confirms broader participation beyond mega-cap leaders.
AI capex news can affect mega-cap technology and semiconductor-heavy index leadership.
Fed policy news affects rate and liquidity expectations; market confirmation is still required.
Positive earnings revisions support expected cash-flow growth.
Mega-cap earnings matter because S&P 500 ETF exposure is cap-weighted.
Higher valuation pressure reduces forward return margin of safety.

top_drivers.description: S&P 500 ETF flow is direct evidence of capital entering or leaving index exposure.
S&P 500 ETFs inherit sensitivity to broad dollar liquidity.
Higher volatility usually reduces S&P 500 ETF risk appetite.
Positive earnings revisions support expected cash-flow growth.
The S&P 500 pool inherits broad US equity conditions before adding index-specific evidence.

pool_reviews.summary: S&P 500 Pool 当前综合分 0.26，正向项：流入流出、上下游/左右节点影响、量价确认、新闻压力、基本面/估值补充；压力项：暂无。

pool_reviews.name: A-share Pool
pool_reviews.label: mild_positive

drivers.description: A-share equity ETF flow is direct evidence of capital entering the domestic ETF market.
Rising margin financing can confirm risk appetite before extreme overheating logic is added.
China credit improvement is upstream liquidity for A-shares.
Improving transaction money relative to broad money can support domestic equity participation.
Equity issuance and refinancing pressure can drain available capital from the A-share pond.
Higher interbank funding cost can reduce A-share liquidity.
RMB depreciation pressure can weaken equity risk appetite and foreign capital willingness.
Turnover confirms that expectations are becoming actual market participation.
Broad participation confirms that the A-share move is not only index-level concentration.
China policy news affects expectations, but still enters as a node observation rather than a direct pool override.

top_drivers.description: China credit improvement is upstream liquidity for A-shares.
China policy news affects expectations, but still enters as a node observation rather than a direct pool override.
A-share equity ETF flow is direct evidence of capital entering the domestic ETF market.
Turnover confirms that expectations are becoming actual market participation.
Improving transaction money relative to broad money can support domestic equity participation.

watch_points: 标普500：观察 上下游/左右节点影响 是否继续主导综合分。
数据完整度偏低：A-share Agriculture Pool、A-share Basic Chemicals Pool、A-share Beauty Care Pool。
A股行业：继续跟踪 A-share Brokerage Pool 的资金流和量价确认是否一致。
通用池分析只解释状态，不输出买卖指令。
interpretation_boundary: General pool analysis is an explainable model layer, not a trading instruction.
A pool can join this output through config without adding market-specific core code.
S&P 500 and A-share industry pools share the same component contract, but each pool declares different concrete inputs in config.
Missing or fallback observations reduce component availability and must not be treated as confirmed trend.
